creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tony Narlock from comment #4)

> The old revisions claimed there was an "empty binary".
>
> Was that confirmed,

Well, the initial report shows all 0s for hd /usr/local/share/chromium/chrome. I wouldn't call that an "empty binary," but others might?

In any case, I'm interested in reports of either reproducing a megabytes-of-zeroes binary, or of building a debug chrome binary that fails to run (with kern.maxtsiz increased).

I can't reproduce either case, and have added the backtrace that I obtained to bug #200601. I haven't had any time to look at it, though.
